**Pixel Phone S4 with Dipoles**

  Test Description:

* Set up MVG WaveStudio for conducted power measurement. Have cable loss set to "0"  
* Calculate the expected radiated power (Conducted \+ dipole efficiency).  
* Measure the radiated power (Same RF cable connected to Dipoles).  
* Calculate the difference between calculated and measured power.
